text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, an unexpected cloudburst assails the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Like cats and dogs, indeed. What to do, what to
do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bump into Symboli Rudolf, who seems to be
deep in thought.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, quite all right, thank you. Only, well... It
seems I have some free time on my hands.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I had student council business outdoors today,
but it's been postponed due to the rain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I went to see what other duties I could take care
of, but I found that Air Groove had beaten me to
the punch.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She already had everything squared firmly away.
Sometimes I feel like she could run this council on
her own...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In any case, as you can see, I am now at a loss for
what to do with myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A failing on my behalf, I suppose. I've grown too
accustomed to having a full schedule.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's what you're worried about? But that's
simple!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heya! You looked a little down in the dumps, so I
thought I'd listen in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I might have guessed. You have a nose for drama.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: At any rate, what exactly is so simple?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Duh! I mean what you should do with your free
time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Look, if you don't know where to start, just do
whatever pops into your head!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see... So spontaneity is vital. The willingness to
be carried away by a whim.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Um... I guess? You don't have to make everything
sound so serious.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, if you can't think of any ideas...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you ask someone close by for a
helping hand? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's all for the drive-by help sesh! I'm
sure you whippersnappers can figure out the rest.
Bye-bye now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Whippersnappers? We're in the same school
year...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: All the same, I see what she's getting at.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It appears I must once again seek your counsel,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What should I do with this abundance of time
thrust upon me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An intriguing idea. I certainly wouldn't want to
squander this opportunity...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hesitate to impose on you further, but could I
ask you to assist me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have some truly excellent material in my
notebook that I would like your opinion on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want you to be as frank as possible, so please
don't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the afternoon, Symboli Rudolf
unleashes a barrage of jokes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an experience too bizarre to describe, but she
seems satisfied by the results.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Research, you say? I certainly can't fault your
diligent attitude.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can hardly let your enthusiasm go
unanswered, can I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Shall we make our way to your office? There
should be some footage of past races there that
we can watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I spend the rest of the
afternoon watching all of the wet weather race
videos we can find.
